title: Marketing Strategist
description:
Marketing Strategist
Full-Time | Singapore | In-House Advertising Team

We are looking for a Marketing Strategist to join our in-house advertising team. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, creative, copywriting, and performance marketing. You will be responsible for developing advertising hooks, writing copy, conducting market research, and shaping how ideas are translated into effective ad creatives.

You will work closely with leadership, graphic designers, motion graphics designers, and media buyers to pitch ideas, guide creative execution, and improve campaign performance through insight-driven testing and iteration.

This is a hands-on role where research, copy, and creative decisions directly impact advertising outcomes.

Key Responsibilities

Market Research and Competitive Insights

  • Conduct ongoing market and competitor research to identify trends, messaging gaps, and creative opportunities.
  • Analyse competitor ads, offers, and positioning to inform new hooks and creative directions.
  • Research audience pain points, objections, motivations, and buying triggers relevant to advertising performance.
  • Translate research findings into actionable recommendations for ad creative and copy.

Advertising Strategy and Hook Development

  • Work with leadership to develop and refine advertising hooks, angles, and campaign narratives.
  • Translate business objectives, offers, and market dynamics into clear messaging strategies.
  • Provide strategic context to the creative team to guide ideation and execution.

Copywriting and Message Framing

  • Write clear, persuasive copy for paid advertising, including primary text, headlines, descriptions, and short-form variations.
  • Frame messages to optimise clarity, attention, and performance in feed-based advertising environments.
  • Adapt copy across different hooks, formats, and audience contexts while maintaining consistency.
  • Collaborate with designers and motion graphics team to ensure copy and visuals work together effectively.

Creative Ideation and Collaboration

  • Participate actively in creative ideation sessions and pitch messaging and creative ideas.
  • Work with designers and motion graphics team to explore different ways to present hooks through copy and visuals.
  • Contribute to first-frame messaging, sequencing, and emphasis decisions.

Creative Testing and Experimentation

  • Plan and structure creative testing frameworks, including hypotheses, variations, and success criteria.
  • Define what variables to test such as hooks, copy framing, offers, pacing, or formats.
  • Prioritise tests based on potential impact and learning value.

Performance Analysis and Insights

  • Analyse campaign performance data to identify trends, insights, and opportunities for improvement.
  • Translate results into clear recommendations for creative and copy iteration.
  • Maintain feedback loops with the creative and media teams based on what is working and why.

Campaign and Messaging Consistency

  • Ensure consistency of messaging and positioning across campaigns, platforms, and touchpoints.
  • Support alignment between paid ads, landing pages, and the broader customer journey.
  • Maintain clarity and discipline in how messaging evolves over time.

Requirements

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in marketing strategy, performance marketing, or advertising.
  • Proven experience in advertising copywriting and messaging development.
  • Experience conducting market or competitor research for marketing or advertising purposes.
  • Strong understanding of paid media environments, especially Meta platforms.
  • Ability to think in hypotheses, testing frameworks, and measurable outcomes.
  • Strong written and analytical communication skills.
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, iterative advertising environment.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in performance or direct response advertising.
  • Familiarity with creative testing and A/B testing methodologies.
  • Experience in automotive, consumer retail, or high-consideration purchase categories.
  • Exposure to working closely with creative, motion, and media buying teams.

postedCompany.description:
Company Name: BYD by 1826


About Us:

Welcome to BYD by 1826, a distinctive fusion of casual-premium dining and automotive retail, offering a remarkable experience that caters to both food lovers and car enthusiasts. Building upon the successful concept of the highly-regarded 1826 Restaurant (Boat Quay), BYD by 1826 represents an innovative union of style, functionality, and sophistication.


Situated in the city's vibrant heart, our two concept stores (Boat Quay and Suntec City) combines the relaxed yet premium dining experience of the 1826 Restaurant with an exclusive showroom showcasing BYD, a globally celebrated manufacturer of electric vehicles and state-of-the-art automotive technology. BYD is currently the world’s largest electric vehicle manufacturer, overtaking Tesla in 2022. With this new concept, we lead the way in delivering a unique, integrated dining and shopping encounter.


What We Do:

BYD by 1826 provides guests with the opportunity to delight in exceptional cuisine in a laid-back yet elegant atmosphere, while simultaneously discovering an array of BYD's most advanced and innovative electric vehicles. We seamlessly blend two traditionally separate experiences into a cohesive and memorable event.


Our restaurant features culinary creations from top-notch chefs; who take pride in developing a diverse menu inspired by seasonal ingredients and global food trends. Our auto showroom presents an impressive collection of BYD vehicles, complete with a team of well-informed, passionate sales professionals always ready to assist and educate.


Our Culture:

Our pursuit of excellence defines every aspect of our work. Our team consists of dynamic, enthusiastic, and forward-thinking individuals with a deep appreciation for food and automotive culture. We cherish diversity, collaboration, and mutual respect, fostering an environment that promotes professional growth and development.


Join Us:

Whether your passion lies in crafting unique gastronomic experiences or in bringing the latest in electric vehicle technology to the public, we encourage you to explore our open positions. We're continuously on the lookout for skilled individuals who thrive in a fast-paced, creative, and customer-focused environment.


Join BYD by 1826 and play a pivotal role in reshaping the conventional boundaries of dining and retail.
postedCompany.name: BYD BY 1826 (SUNTEC)  PTE. LTD.
